scenarios.title: Damage caused by unauthorized repair
scenarios.description: The iPhone stopped functioning after a third-party repair shop replaced the battery. The customer is seeking coverage for the resulting issues.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider ("AASP").

scenarios.reasoning: Coverage is denied because the damage resulted from service performed by a non-authorized repair provider, which is explicitly excluded under section 4.2(ii)(d). No service fee applies and this does not count toward the accidental damage from handling limit.
